name: The Manager's room
description:
Although very busy, this room is nothing compared to the rest of the flet.  
The room has little furniture, only the manager's desk, his chair, and another
chair facing him.  As your eyes scan the room, you see the typical wooden walls
and floor.  The roof is a natural canopy of leaves from one of the higher
branches.  Occasionally an elf enters the room, drops off papers and picks up
something, and leaves.  Outside, you can hear random tidbits of conversation
and shouting of orders.
